scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:cli
scripts.build:packages: tsc -b --force packages/core packages/provider-core packages/tc packages/crypto packages/backup packages/provider-docker packages/provider-dstack packages/attest packages/packrunner packages/backupd packages/cli
scripts.build:cli: mkdir -p dist && bun build packages/cli/src/index.ts --compile --external cpu-features --outfile dist/tinyagent
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/provider-core packages/tc packages/crypto packages/backup packages/provider-docker packages/provider-dstack packages/attest packages/packrunner packages/backupd packages/cli --pretty false
